title: Just for men Moustache & Beard Medium Brown Dye, Eliminates Grey for a Thicker & Fuller Look – M35

features: New look, same great results. Just For Men Mustache & Beard, Medium Brown, M35, is beard colouring that makes getting rid of grey facial hair easy. Unlike other dyes, this beard colour is formulated specifically for coarser facial hair. Eliminates grey for a thicker and fuller look.

This men's beard colouring product is easy to use. Simply mix the colour base and developer, use the brush to apply, wait five minutes, rinse the product out, shampoo, and you're done. Be sure to read and follow the enclosed leaflet for the best results

Choose from 7 different shades ranging from blond to real black. When in doubt or unsure of which to choose, always go with the lighter shade. Brush included and is designed to distribute colour with ease. Now formulated with biotin, aloe, and coconut oil

Up to 3 applications per box. Apply as often as needed. We know every man is different so our product is here when those grey hairs begin to grow back. Works well on any type of facial hair - beards, mustaches, soul patches, goatees. Great for touch ups
For the best results, make sure to follow all instructions included in the package, perform a skin allergy test 48 hours before use, and always use the gloves provided to avoid staining
description: Product Description Give your image an instant boost with Just For Men® Moustache & Beard which is easy to use, brush in colour gel, blending grey away in 5 minutes. Designed to last for up to a month, until the grey grows back, the gel includes special conditioners to leave hair less bristly, softer and easier to control. It penetrates coarse facial hair and each shade matches with the Just For Men® Original Formula hair colour. Moustache & Beard comes in a range of natural-looking shades. Can't decide between the two? Try the lighter shade first. You can always go darker later. Ingredients Aqua , Coco Glucoside, Aminomethyl Propanol , Carboner Resorcinol, Parfum, P- Phenylenediamine, Sodium Sulfite , Erythrobic Acid, P- Aminophenol, Caramel, Trisodium Edta, N,N-Bis (2-Hydroxyethyl)-P-Phenylenediamine Sulfate,CinnamidopropyLtrimonium Chloride, Laurdimonium Hydroxypropyl Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein , Panthenol, Tocopheryl Acetate, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice , Chamomilla Recuitita (Matricaria)Flower Extract, Linalool, Limonene, Alpha- Isomethyl Lonone, Benzyl Benzoate. Directions Mix color base and developer, apply to beard, wait five minutes, rinse, shampoo; follow enclosed leaflet for best results. See more
